overrides.override_summary: No statement/questionnaire may waive state franchise law claims or disclaim reliance on franchisor statements
overrides.why_it_matters: Protects franchisees from signing away fraud-in-the-inducement claims

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee must comply with Fast Food Act (AB 1228) regarding minimum wages, working hours, working conditions
overrides.why_it_matters: Higher labor costs in California; franchisor provides no compliance assistance or training

overrides.override_summary: Additional funds estimate adjusted for Fast Food Act compliance costs
overrides.why_it_matters: Higher initial capital needed for CA operations due to wage requirements

overrides.override_summary: General release required at renewal/transfer does not apply to claims under Maryland Franchise Registration and Disclosure Law
overrides.why_it_matters: MD franchisees retain right to sue under MD franchise law even after signing release

overrides.override_summary: Termination upon insolvency might not be enforceable under federal bankruptcy law
overrides.why_it_matters: Bankruptcy protection may override insolvency termination trigger

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee may bring MD Franchise Law claims in Maryland courts
overrides.why_it_matters: Overrides Atlanta GA forum selection for MD-specific claims

overrides.override_summary: MD Franchise Registration and Disclosure Law may apply, subject to arbitration obligations
overrides.why_it_matters: MD law may supersede Georgia law for franchise-specific claims

overrides.override_summary: Claims under MD Franchise Law must be brought within 3 years after grant of franchise
overrides.why_it_matters: Longer than FA's 1-year limitations period for MD franchise claims

overrides.override_summary: Standard MN franchise registration notice; MN-specific consumer protections apply
overrides.why_it_matters: MN franchise law provides additional protections beyond FTC Rule
ND is among the most franchisee-protective states

overrides.override_summary: Assurance of Discontinuance with WA Attorney General regarding no-poaching provisions
overrides.why_it_matters: No-poaching provisions unenforceable in WA; franchisees can hire from other Sonic restaurants

overrides.override_summary: MI Franchise Investment Law: cannot terminate without good cause; good cause includes failure to comply and cure within 30 days
overrides.why_it_matters: Enhanced cure period protections for MI franchisees

overrides.override_summary: MI prohibits requiring arbitration/litigation outside state
overrides.why_it_matters: Atlanta GA forum selection may be void for MI franchisees

overrides.override_summary: MI requires fair market value compensation if franchisor refuses to renew and term <5 years
WI franchise law modifications apply to WI franchisees
